final_prompt.prompt: 参考这些LOGO和结合网上公司的logo设计，帮我用英文ZD设计一个玩具公司的logo，要求简约一点，边缘不要太锋利，,英文要抽象一点，可以结合一点水滴元素，水滴元素要和logo相结合，融合到一起，不要直接加上去一个水滴，整个logo要有整体性，不要太割裂，要有创新和设计感[@image:#1:524b8f6461ac4e1c0e9e301a4fd91ca5]

raw: {"prompt": "Logo design for a toy company using the letters \"ZD\". Style: minimalist, rounded soft edges (no sharp corners), abstract letterform treatment. The letters Z and D are organically integrated with water droplet elements — the droplet shape is not added separately but morphs into and flows out of the letterforms themselves, so the water drop becomes part of the Z or D stroke (e.g., the curve of D echoes a droplet silhouette, or a teardrop void is carved into the negative space). The overall mark reads as a single cohesive unit with no visual disconnect between the type and the water motif. Color palette: clean and modern (suggest soft aqua or gradient blue-to-teal). The design should feel innovative and considered, with a playful yet refined character appropriate for a toy brand. Flat vector logo, white background, centered composition.", "size": "1024x1024", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}
